
```{r}
t.test(slider.response ~ agegroup, data = shop_stat, var.equal = TRUE)

shop_stat_young <- subset(shop_stat, shop_stat$agegroup== "Young")
shop_stat_older <- subset(shop_stat, shop_stat$agegroup== "Older")

mean(shop_stat_young$slider.response)
sd(shop_stat_young$slider.response)

mean(shop_stat_older$slider.response)
sd(shop_stat_older$slider.response)
```


```{r}
shop_stat_figure_online <- shop_stat_online%>%
  group_by(agegroup) %>%
  summarise_at(vars(slider_online.response), list(slider_online.response = mean)) %>%
  as.data.frame()

shop_stat_figure_online$agegroup <- factor(shop_stat_figure_online$agegroup, levels = c("Young", "Older"))

shop_stat_graph_online <- ggplot(data=shop_stat_figure_online, aes(x=agegroup, y= slider_online.response)) +
geom_bar(stat="identity", position=position_dodge(), col = "black")+
  scale_fill_manual(values=c("#9AC0CD", "#68838B")) +
  guides(fill = guide_legend(reverse = FALSE)) +
  labs(x = "Age Group", y = "Online Grocery Shopping") +
  theme(text=element_text(size=16,  family="Times New Roman"), panel.background = element_rect(fill='transparent'),legend.direction = "horizontal",legend.position = c(0.7, 0.8), legend.title = element_blank(),axis.line.x = element_line(color="black", size = .3), axis.line.y = element_line(color="black", size = .3), axis.ticks.x=element_blank()) + ylim(0,10)

shop_stat_graph_online
```

```{r}
t.test(slider_online.response ~ agegroup, data = shop_stat_online, var.equal = TRUE)

shop_stat_online_young <- subset(shop_stat_online, shop_stat_online$agegroup== "Young")
shop_stat_online_older <- subset(shop_stat_online, shop_stat_online$agegroup== "Older")

mean(shop_stat_online_young$slider_online.response)
sd(shop_stat_online_young$slider_online.response)

mean(shop_stat_online_older$slider_online.response)
sd(shop_stat_online_older$slider_online.response)
```
```{r}
#curiosity and age group
#cur_z*all_list+ trait_cur_z
t.test(slider_2.response ~ agegroup, data = all_data_check2, var.equal = TRUE)

all_data_check2_young <- subset(all_data_check2, all_data_check2$agegroup== "Young")
all_data_check2_older <- subset(all_data_check2, all_data_check2$agegroup== "Older")


trait_curiosity <- all_data_check2 %>% select(bruinID.text, agegroup, trait_cur)
trait_curiosity <- trait_curiosity[!duplicated(trait_curiosity), ]

trait_curiosity_young <- subset(trait_curiosity, trait_curiosity$agegroup== "Young")
trait_curiosity_older <- subset(trait_curiosity, trait_curiosity$agegroup== "Older")

t.test(trait_cur ~ agegroup, data = trait_curiosity, var.equal = TRUE)

mean(all_data_check2_young$slider_2.response)
sd(all_data_check2_young$slider_2.response)

mean(all_data_check2_older$slider_2.response)
sd(all_data_check2_older$slider_2.response)

mean(trait_curiosity_young$trait_cur)
sd(trait_curiosity_young$trait_cur)

mean(trait_curiosity_older$trait_cur)
sd(trait_curiosity_older$trait_cur)
```

```{r}
curiosity_graph_summary$agegroup <- factor(
  curiosity_graph_summary$agegroup,
  levels = c("Young", "Older")  # put top-to-bottom order here
)

ggplot(curiosity_graph_summary,
       aes(x = slider_2.response,
           y = priceresults,
          linetype = agegroup,
           color = agegroup)) +
  geom_smooth(se = FALSE) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("black", "black")) +
  theme(
    text = element_text(size = 16, family = "Times New Roman"),
    panel.background = element_rect(fill = "transparent"),
    legend.position = c(0.85, 0.75),
    legend.title = element_blank(),
    axis.line.x = element_line(color = "black", linewidth = .3),
    axis.line.y = element_line(color = "black", linewidth = .3),
    axis.ticks.x = element_blank()
  ) +
  labs(
    x = "Curiosity",
    y = "Proportion Correct"
  ) +
  ylim(0, 1) +
  xlim(0, 10)
```
```{r}
ggplot(curiosity_graph_summary,
       aes(x = slider_2.response,
           y = results,
          linetype = agegroup,
           color = agegroup)) +
  geom_smooth(se = FALSE) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("black", "black")) +
  theme(
    text = element_text(size = 16, family = "Times New Roman"),
    panel.background = element_rect(fill = "transparent"),
    legend.position = c(0.85, 0.45),
    legend.title = element_blank(),
    axis.line.x = element_line(color = "black", linewidth = .3),
    axis.line.y = element_line(color = "black", linewidth = .3),
    axis.ticks.x = element_blank()
  ) +
  labs(
    x = "Curiosity",
    y = "Proportion Correct"
  ) +
  ylim(0, 1) +
  xlim(0, 10)
```


```{r}
correlation_all_fig_s <- ggplot(all_data_check2, aes(x = slider_2.response, y = results, color = agegroup)) +
  geom_smooth(method = loess, se = FALSE) +
  labs(x = "State Curiosity", y = "Price Results Proportion Correct") +
  theme(text=element_text(size=16,  family="Times New Roman"), panel.background = element_rect(fill='transparent'), legend.title = element_blank(),axis.line.x = element_line(color="black", size = .3), axis.line.y = element_line(color="black", size = .3), axis.ticks.x=element_blank())+ 
  theme(
    text = element_text(size = 16, family = "Times New Roman"),
    panel.background = element_rect(fill = 'transparent')
  ) +
  ylim(0, 1)


correlation_all_fig_s
```
```{r}
correlation_all_fig_s <- ggplot(all_data_check2, aes(x = slider_2.response, y = priceresults, color = agegroup)) +
  geom_smooth(method = loess, se = FALSE) +
  labs(x = "State Curiosity", y = "Price Results Proportion Correct") +
  theme(text=element_text(size=16,  family="Times New Roman"), panel.background = element_rect(fill='transparent'), legend.title = element_blank(),axis.line.x = element_line(color="black", size = .3), axis.line.y = element_line(color="black", size = .3), axis.ticks.x=element_blank())+ 
  theme(
    text = element_text(size = 16, family = "Times New Roman"),
    panel.background = element_rect(fill = 'transparent')
  ) +
  ylim(0, 1)


correlation_all_fig_s
```
